//: tsx/esbuild config for the CLI render script. The root tsconfig keeps `jsx: preserve` for the Next compiler, which would leave JSX untransformed (so lib/pdf/template.tsx — which has no `import React` — throws `React is not defined` at runtime). Here we extend the root config but switch to the React 17+ automatic runtime, mirroring how vitest.config.ts configures it for tests. `npm run render:test` points tsx at this file.
